label: Goodwill situation
description: Defines a situation that changes a faction's natural goodwill or maximum goodwill toward the player.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# GoodwillSituationWorker subclass that determines when this situation applies and how it affects goodwill.

baseMaxGoodwill.label: Base max goodwill
baseMaxGoodwill.description: Maximum goodwill this situation permits between the player and the affected faction. Loadable but not read by any shipped worker implementation.

meme.label: Meme
meme.description: MemeDef matched against the player faction's or other faction's ideology by the meme-compatibility worker.

otherMeme.label: Other meme
otherMeme.description: MemeDef matched against the opposing faction's ideology. When omitted with the meme-compatibility worker, the situation applies to any opposing meme.

naturalGoodwillOffset.label: Natural goodwill offset
naturalGoodwillOffset.description: Flat offset applied to the faction's natural goodwill toward the player while this situation is active. Positive values improve relations; negative values worsen them.

versusAll.label: Versus all
versusAll.description: If true, the meme-compatibility worker matches the meme field against all opposing memes instead of a specific otherMeme.

basic-goodwill-situation.label: Basic goodwill situation
basic-goodwill-situation.description: Custom worker-controlled goodwill situation with a fixed offset.

meme-compatibility-situation.label: Meme compatibility situation
meme-compatibility-situation.description: Goodwill offset based on ideology meme agreement or disagreement between factions.
